{{CargoRelic
|name=Haunted Cabinet
|class_id=20026
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=It is said that an evil spirit is sealed in this wine cabinet. After it's out of wine, the spirit will cast a curse on the cabinet owner: They will keep having the same nightmare about an evil witch! Research shows, however, that it's just hallucinations caused by overconsumption of alcohol.
|fame=17
|art=15
|fth=29
|civ=12
|tech=17
|ss1=Food rewards from offering +0.4%
|ss2=Food rewards from offering +0.8%
|ss3=Food rewards from offering +1.2%
|ss4=Food rewards from offering +1.2%
|ss7=Food rewards from offering +1.2%<br> (Awakened)
}}
